title: Meta Immersive Web SDK GitHub Repository
citation: Meta Platforms. facebook/immersive-web-sdk GitHub repository README and license metadata, accessed 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Technology evaluation for OpenClinXR WebXR runtime architecture, Quest 3 development workflow, spatial UI, interaction, locomotion, and asset-optimization spikes.
claims_supported: The repository describes Immersive Web SDK as a Three.js-powered WebXR framework with ECS, interactions, locomotion, spatial UI, physics, scene understanding, and desktop mouse-and-keyboard emulation.

The repository lists packages including @iwsdk/core, @iwsdk/glxf, @iwsdk/locomotor, @iwsdk/xr-input, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-dev, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-gltf-optimizer, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-uikitml, and @iwsdk/vite-plugin-metaspatial.
The repository README states IWSDK is licensed under MIT.
The repository documents npm create @iwsdk@latest for new projects and npm install @iwsdk/core three for existing projects.
claims_not_supported: That IWSDK has been installed or adopted by the OpenClinXR workspace.
That IWSDK is production-proven for high-stakes clinical simulation assessment.
That IWSDK should replace the existing minimal Three.js headset shell before a local spike measures bundle, Vite compatibility, and Quest 3 behavior.
That all optional Meta ecosystem packages or asset services have OpenClinXR-compatible license and procurement posture.
